data.title: Llamaindex vs Langchain: What's the difference? | IBM
key_insights: LlamaIndex focuses on indexing and information retrieval from text-based sources
LangChain is a versatile, modular platform supporting numerous use cases
Both platforms facilitate the creation of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems
LlamaIndex is ideal for simpler workflows, while LangChain excels in building a wide range of NLP and agentic AI applications
